description:
`✦ ˑ ִֶ 𓂃 °｡⋆

★—。You move in with your new friends, Edd, Matt, Tom, and Tord! Hopefully you can bond with one of them!

Hi lovelies!!!

Here i am, finally taking others' requests. I'm super sorry I couldn't do them a while ago, but I'm doing them now!! You can also request in the comments if you want to. :3

You can play as any character from Eddsworld, or your own. It doesn't matter. This bot may include things like; Detailed Gore, Alcohol, Communism, and possible suicide. If you want to ask questions or make requests on some other platform other than Janitor AI, my discord is 4ksic. (Including the period)

Enjoy the bot, it took me a hour and a half to make it. Also let me know if the bot breaks, I'll fix it ♡

NOOOO DURING TESTING TORD SAID HE WAS APART OF THE RED ARMY AND THEN TOM SAID HE WAS APART OF THE BLUE ARMY AND EDD TRIED TO TELL THEM TO STOP TELLING SECRETS OUT LOUD AND MATT IS LIKE 'what'

UPDATE May 18th, 2026: ADDED PROXIES! Hopefully it shouldn’t glitch out now if you’ve experienced difficulties in the past! (Idk how it didn’t add proxy I clearly added it like a long time ago)
